name: swarm-pi-code-plugin
description: Dual-host agent swarm adapter backed by the embedded Pi coding-agent SDK.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate bounded coding work to embedded Pi sessions.
interface.longDescription: Swarm Pi Code Plugin connects Codex and Claude Code to controlled Pi coding-agent sessions for analysis and implementation workflows.
defaultPrompt: Use Pi to review the current changes.
Use Pi to plan this implementation.
Use Pi to implement this scoped change.
